description: Outcome-based persistent memory for AI coding tools (Claude Code, OpenCode)
release_notes: v0.5.4: Profile binding is now per-request instead of per-process. FastAPI no longer binds a single profile at startup - it holds a per-profile registry and resolves the active profile on every request via an X-Roampal-Profile header sent by each client (MCP server, OpenCode plugin, Claude Code / Cursor hooks). Fixes issue #7 where OpenCode Desktop's per-project ROAMPAL_PROFILE in opencode.json was ignored. Also ships: sidecar config hydration from opencode.json at FastAPI startup, TagService unification with Desktop (async extract + client lock to prevent local-model GPU OOM), 1 sidecar call per /api/summarize request (down from 3-4), facts extraction retry loop in the OpenCode plugin, and eight audit-driven bug fixes. Test suite: 603 passing, 3 pre-existing skips, 0 failed. Live-validated across OpenCode CLI, OpenCode with per-project opencode.json, and Claude Code hooks.
